info.name: TravelMate API
info.description:
Postman collection for testing the TravelMate hotel booking API.

## Getting Started

1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set up the environment variables:
   - `baseUrl`: API base URL (default: http://localhost:3000/api)
   - `token`: JWT authentication token (set automatically after login)
3. Run the "Register User" or "Login" request first to get a token
4. The token will be automatically saved and used for authenticated requests

## Test Order

1. Authentication (Register/Login)
2. Users (Get, Update, Delete)
3. Hotels (List, Create, Update, Delete)
4. Bookings (Create, List, Update, Cancel)

item.name: Authentication
item.description: User authentication endpoints for registration and login.

request.description:
Creates a new user account.

**Request Body:**
- `email` (required): Unique email address
- `password` (required): Minimum 8 characters
- `firstName` (required): User's first name
- `lastName` (required): User's last name
- `phone` (optional): Phone number

**Expected Response:** 201 Created with user details

response.name: Successful Registration
response.body:
{
  "id": 6,
  "email": "newuser@example.com",
  "firstName": "New",
  "lastName": "User",
  "phone": "+1-555-000-0000",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-22T10:00:00Z"
}

response.name: Email Already Exists
Validation Error

exec: // Save the token to collection variable
// Save user ID for later use

request.description:
Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

**Request Body:**
- `email` (required): User's email address
- `password` (required): User's password

**Expected Response:** 200 OK with JWT token

**Note:** The token is automatically saved to the `token` collection variable for use in authenticated requests.

response.name: Successful Login
Invalid Credentials

request.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of all users. Requires admin authentication.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (optional): Page number, default 1
- `limit` (optional): Items per page, default 10

response.name: Success

request.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific user.

**Path Parameters:**
- `userId`: The ID of the user to retrieve

response.name: Success
response.body:

}

response.name: Not Found

request.description:
Updates user profile information.

**Path Parameters:**
- `userId`: The ID of the user to update

**Request Body:**
- `firstName` (optional): New first name
- `lastName` (optional): New last name
- `phone` (optional): New phone number

request.description:
Permanently deletes a user account. This action cannot be undone.

**Path Parameters:**
- `userId`: The ID of the user to delete

exec: // Save first hotel ID for later use

request.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of hotels with optional filtering.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`: Page number (default: 1)
- `limit`: Hotels per page (default: 10, max: 50)
- `city`: Filter by city name
- `country`: Filter by country
- `minPrice`: Minimum price per night
- `maxPrice`: Maximum price per night
- `minRating`: Minimum star rating (1-5)
- `amenities`: Comma-separated list of amenities

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Grand Plaza Hotel",
      "description": "Luxury 5-star hotel in the heart of Paris",
      "address": "123 Champs-Élysées",
      "city": "Paris",
      "country": "France",
      "postalCode": "75008",
      "starRating": 5,
      "pricePerNight": 299.99,
      "amenities": ["wifi", "pool", "spa", "gym", "restaurant"],
      "imageUrl": "https://images.travelmate.com/hotels/grand-plaza.jpg",
      "totalRooms": 150,
      "availableRooms": 23
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "currentPage": 1,
    "totalPages": 1,
    "totalItems": 10,
    "itemsPerPage": 10
  }
}

request.description: Example: Filter hotels by city name.

request.description:
Creates a new hotel listing. Requires admin authentication.

**Request Body:**
- `name` (required): Hotel name
- `address` (required): Street address
- `city` (required): City name
- `country` (required): Country name
- `starRating` (required): 1-5 star rating
- `pricePerNight` (required): Price in USD
- `totalRooms` (required): Total number of rooms
- `description` (optional): Hotel description
- `postalCode` (optional): Postal/ZIP code
- `amenities` (optional): Array of amenities
- `imageUrl` (optional): URL to hotel image

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "id": 11,
  "name": "New Boutique Hotel",
  "description": "A charming new boutique hotel in the city center",
  "address": "456 Main Street",
  "city": "Barcelona",
  "country": "Spain",
  "postalCode": "08001",
  "starRating": 4,
  "pricePerNight": 159.99,
  "amenities": ["wifi", "breakfast", "gym"],
  "imageUrl": "https://images.travelmate.com/hotels/new-boutique.jpg",
  "totalRooms": 50,
  "availableRooms": 50,
  "createdAt": "2024-01-22T10:00:00Z"
}

request.description:
Removes a hotel from the system. Requires admin authentication.

**Path Parameters:**
- `hotelId`: The ID of the hotel to delete

response.name: Has Active Bookings

request.description:
Checks room availability for a specific date range.

**Path Parameters:**
- `hotelId`: The ID of the hotel to check

**Query Parameters:**
- `checkIn` (required): Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `checkOut` (required): Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `guests` (optional): Number of guests (default: 2)

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "hotelId": 1,
  "hotelName": "Grand Plaza Hotel",
  "checkIn": "2024-03-15",
  "checkOut": "2024-03-20",
  "nights": 5,
  "availableRooms": 12,
  "pricePerNight": 299.99,
  "totalPrice": 1499.95,
  "taxes": 149.99,
  "grandTotal": 1649.94,
  "currency": "USD"
}

exec: // Save first booking ID for later use

request.description:
Retrieves bookings. Regular users see only their own bookings, admins can see all.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`: Page number
- `limit`: Bookings per page
- `status`: Filter by status (pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed)
- `userId`: Filter by user ID (admin only)
- `hotelId`: Filter by hotel ID

response.name: Success

request.description: Example: Filter bookings by status.

Retrieves detailed information about a specific booking.

**Path Parameters:**
- `bookingId`: The ID of the booking to retrieve

request.description:
Creates a new hotel booking.

**Request Body:**
- `hotelId` (required): ID of the hotel to book
- `checkIn` (required): Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `checkOut` (required): Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `guests` (required): Number of guests
- `rooms` (optional): Number of rooms (default: 1)
- `specialRequests` (optional): Special requests or notes

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "id": 8,
  "userId": 2,
  "hotelId": 1,
  "hotelName": "Grand Plaza Hotel",
  "hotelAddress": "123 Champs-Élysées, Paris, France",
  "checkIn": "2024-04-15",
  "checkOut": "2024-04-20",
  "guests": 2,
  "rooms": 1,
  "nights": 5,
  "pricePerNight": 299.99,
  "subtotal": 1499.95,
  "taxes": 149.99,
  "totalPrice": 1649.94,
  "currency": "USD",
  "status": "pending",
  "specialRequests": "Non-smoking room, high floor if possible",
  "confirmationCode": "TM-2024-NEW001",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-22T11:00:00Z"
}

response.name: No Availability

request.description:
Updates an existing booking. Only pending bookings can be modified.

**Path Parameters:**
- `bookingId`: The ID of the booking to update

**Request Body:** Any booking fields to update

response.name: Success
response.body:
{

response.name: Cannot Modify

request.description:
Cancels a booking. Cancellation policies may apply based on timing.

**Path Parameters:**
- `bookingId`: The ID of the booking to cancel

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "bookingId": 8,
  "status": "cancelled",
  "refundAmount": 1649.94,
  "refundPercentage": 100,
  "message": "Booking cancelled successfully. Full refund will be processed within 5-7 business days."
}

response.name: Cannot Cancel

request.description:
Confirms a pending booking after payment verification. Requires admin authentication.

**Path Parameters:**
- `bookingId`: The ID of the booking to confirm

**Request Body:**
- `paymentReference` (required): Payment transaction reference

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "id": 8,
  "userId": 2,
  "hotelId": 1,

  "nights": 5,
  "pricePerNight": 299.99,

  "currency": "USD",
  "status": "confirmed",
  "specialRequests": "Need extra bed for third guest",

}
